ORDER DENYING DEFENDANTS MOTION TO STRIKE (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT 1016 WASHINGTON STREET, LLC, YAT-HON AU, OREN RUBENSTEIN DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT TO ALLEGE AN EXPRESS TERM OF THE CONTACT THAT HAS BEEN BREACHED. DEMURER IS OVERRULED AS TO THE CAUSES OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF IMPLIED COVENANTS AS THE RENTAL AGREEMENT IS SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGED TO SUPPORT CAUSES OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF COVENANTS IMPLIED IN ANY RENTAL AGREEMENT. DEMURER TO THE UCL CAUSE OF ACTION IS OVERRULED. PLAINTIFF, CURRENT TENANT AT THE PREMISES SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGES STANDING TO SEEK INJUNCTION OF UNLAWFUL PRACTICES. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). ORDER TO BE SUBMITTED WITHIN FIVE DAYS. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (501)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-13-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Rowena Lizin, Esq., (415)438-6617 of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith LLP for Defendant/Moving 1016 Washington Street, LLC

Jason Wolford, Esq., (415)524-4853 for Plaintiff/Opposing party Suzanne Meredith

Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral arguments adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT 1016 WASHINGTON STREET, LLC, YAT-HON AU, OREN RUBENSTEIN MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is DENIED. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges facts to support request for punitive damages. Motion to strike as to the cause of action for breach of contract is moot in light of the ruling on demurrer. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-13-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Rowena Lizin, Esq., (415)438-6617 of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith LLP for Defendant/Moving 1016 Washington Street, LLC

Jason Wolford, Esq., (415)524-4853 for Plaintiff/Opposing party Suzanne Meredith

Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard no oral arguments adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT 1016 WASHINGTON STREET, LLC, YAT-HON AU, OREN RUBENSTEIN DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained in part and overruled in part. The Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to the cause of action for breach of contract to allege an express term of the contact that has been breached. Demurer is overruled as to the causes of action for breach of implied covenants as the rental agreement is sufficiently alleged to support causes of action for breach of covenants implied in any rental agreement. Demurer to the UCL cause of action is overruled. Plaintiff, current tenant at the premises sufficiently alleges standing to seek injunction of unlawful practices. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Order to be submitted within five days. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-08-2015 Continued To Nov-13-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant's Demurrer to Complaint is Continued to November 13, 2015. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copies of the moving papers, reply and the operative complaint to department 501 no later than October 23, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
